steps.title: Identify angle equality and similar triangles
steps.content: The figure marks angles at $W$ and $Y$ both as $a°$, so $\angle QWX = \angle QYZ$. Since $WZ$ and $XY$ intersect at $Q$, angles $\angle WQX$ and $\angle YQZ$ are vertical angles, making them equal. By AA similarity, triangle $WQX \sim$ triangle $YQZ$.

steps.title: Set up the proportion from corresponding sides
steps.content:
In similar triangles, corresponding sides are proportional:

$$\frac{WQ}{YQ} = \frac{WX}{YZ}$$

$$\frac{70}{63} = \frac{60}{YZ}$$

steps.title: Cross multiply and solve for YZ
